data.body: Additional data: problem persists after /reload-plugins (Reloaded: 1 plugin · 3 skills · 29 agents · 14 hooks). This rules out a stale skill registry from context compaction — the skill list is refreshed but dso:fix-bug still returns 'Unknown skill'. The system-reminder in this session shows dso:fix-bug IS present in the available skills list after reload, which suggests the Skill tool invocation is failing for a different reason than registry staleness. Possible cause: the skill's trigger condition (a bash check for the digital-service-orchestra plugin) is returning false despite the plugin being loaded.
